reviews.review_description: Refund please pretty bad Hero bound one of the first and best games still work but this one doesn't because the creator doesn't give a f$#k

Get up off you butt soldier!! You don't realize what potential you have! Port this to Oculus Go, update the game and use you limitless creativity, and get this black flag VR experience going. Make that money! Never give up!
Terrible.  Doesn't work with my controller
So much potential. Fun game but very short. Let's hope for an update with more content!

I think the 1 star reviews are way too overcritical, does this game need improving? Yes. But it is a pretty entertaining pirate experience, its not nearly as polished as the Assassins Creed pirates game for android but i didnt expect it to be. I agree on land the stick to turn is way too slow and on the sea can be improved but is serviceable, i like the on land segments as it breaks up the sailing portion even if its very simplistic. Its obvious by the lack of response that the developer will not update and improve this but i got it half off so im satisfied with my purchase
Too short. Poor 3d.  It's a half baked with broken 3d. Should have been free or developer need to update and expand the game. Otherwise it's a rip off to pay for this.
Installation failed on s7 device. I have cleared up enough space for this and nothing

reviews.review_title: Fun scenes, variety of game play
reviews.review_description:
This is one of the first games I've seen where the game play style switches by level. The naval battles are really fun, while the shooting sections are challenging. The storyline is a bit hard to follow but it's certainly there. Some reviews complain about short game, but I had enough fun and spent enough time to make it worthwhile and it took several attempts to beat some of the levels.

My biggest complaint is there are some graphical glitches where things get cut off at certain angles, or things up close that give me double vision. If this company made another game or expanded this one, I'd give it a go.

Many things look like a toy, my ship is unrealistic, for example the sails are missings, the guns are self firing?!?,people look small as heak,waves are 2 simple, AND I CAN'T USE ThE JOYSTICK ON LAND BUT IN THE WATER
This game is really fun and challenge. Love it.

reviews.review_title: Fun and creative, but too short.
reviews.review_description: Just when I was really getting into it, it's over. I could hardly believe that was the whole game.

I know alot of people are saying it's a waste of money and all that. But 4.99 isn't bad for the fun little story you get to experience in VR. I'm a huuuuge pirates lover and if you are too you know how hard it is to find a pirate game to play and enjoy sadly. #NeedMorePirateVRGames. So anyways I just beat the game and yes it's a little shorter then I thought it would of been. But over all the little story you do play and the VR experience is in my book anyways worth the 4.99 now if the developers did update this game and add more to the story that would be even better. Haha ^_^

reviews.review_title: Good fun but would prefer realism
reviews.review_description: Certainly a step it the right direction for gear vr games. It just makes me think how great a more realistic pirate game could be, something more along the lines of side meirs pirates. Combat is fun once you get mortar and chain shot. Land mode should definitely have free movement, teleporting style movement sucks.
